metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if pred_norm == "officiaallanguage":
              return f"has official language {obj}"
with:
  if pred_norm == "officiallanguage":
              return f"has official language {obj}"
Change 2: Replace:
  # Combine all clauses into a single sentence
      sentence = ", ".join(clauses) + "."
      # Capitalise first character
      return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
with:
  # Combine all clauses into a single sentence with proper conjunctions
      if not clauses:
          return ""
      if len(clauses) == 1:
          sentence_body = clauses[0]
      else:
          sentence_body = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1]
      sentence = sentence_body + "."
      # Capitalise first character
      return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
